entryPoint.notes: Triggered by the search text input onChange and the file-type select onChange. Merges the partial filter object into this.state.filters. No API call — filterDocuments() runs on next render.
Triggered by the view-mode toggle button onClick. Toggles this.state.viewMode between 'grid' and 'list'. No API call.
Triggered by the Refresh button onClick. Delegates directly to loadDocuments().

calls.notes: Sets loading=true, clears error, then awaits fetchDocuments(). On success sets documents=[]; on failure sets error message.
axios GET /api/documents with Bearer token from localStorage('docvault_token').
SELECT * FROM documents_v2 ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC. Returns { documents: rows }.
